tasks.subject: Task 0: Migration + schema foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create migration 0020, add two tables to schema.ts, extend enums, register in journal.

**Files:**
- Create: `migrations/0020_r06_returned_product.sql`
- Modify: `migrations/meta/_journal.json`
- Modify: `shared/schema.ts`
- Modify: `server/signatures/signatures.ts`
- Modify: `server/storage.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `pnpm migrate:up` applies cleanly against a fresh DB
- [ ] `pnpm check:migrations` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes

**Verify:** `pnpm migrate:up && pnpm check:migrations && pnpm typecheck` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["migrations/0020_r06_returned_product.sql", "migrations/meta/_journal.json", "shared/schema.ts", "server/signatures/signatures.ts", "server/storage.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm migrate:up && pnpm check:migrations && pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm migrate:up applies cleanly against a fresh DB", "pnpm check:migrations passes", "pnpm typecheck passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Storage layer — intake, list, get, investigations
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement all storage functions for returned products and return investigations in a standalone module.

**Files:**
- Create: `server/storage/returned-products.ts`
- Test: `server/__tests__/r06-returned-products.storage.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `createReturnIntake` creates a QUARANTINE record with RET-YYYYMMDD-NNN ref
- [ ] `createReturnIntake` opens an investigation when lot count >= threshold
- [ ] A second intake for the same lot does NOT open a second investigation when one is already open
- [ ] `listReturnedProducts` filters by status and lotId
- [ ] `getReturnedProduct` throws 404 for unknown ID

**Verify:** `pnpm test r06-returned-products.storage` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/storage/returned-products.ts", "server/__tests__/r06-returned-products.storage.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test r06-returned-products.storage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createReturnIntake creates a QUARANTINE record with RET-YYYYMMDD-NNN ref", "createReturnIntake opens an investigation when lot count >= threshold", "Second intake does NOT open second investigation when one already open", "listReturnedProducts filters by status and lotId", "getReturnedProduct throws 404 for unknown ID"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: API routes + integration tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire all 8 returned-products routes into routes.ts and cover them with supertest integration tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/routes.ts`
- Test: `server/__tests__/r06-returned-products.routes.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/returned-products creates intake record, returns 201 with returnRef
- [ ] POST /api/returned-products/:id/disposition enforces F-04 password; 401 on wrong password
- [ ] Disposition requires lot_id set; returns 422 if lot_id is null
- [ ] GET /api/returned-products/summary returns quarantineCount and openInvestigationsCount
- [ ] All routes reject unauthenticated requests with 401

**Verify:** `pnpm test r06-returned-products.routes` → all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/routes.ts", "server/__tests__/r06-returned-products.routes.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test r06-returned-products.routes", "acceptanceCriteria": ["POST /api/returned-products creates intake record with 201", "POST disposition enforces F-04 password", "Disposition requires lot_id", "Summary route returns counts", "All routes reject unauthenticated with 401"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Dashboard tiles + getUserTasks + complaint SLA fix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 2 return tiles to the dashboard, extend getUserTasks with return task queries, and fix getComplaintsSummary to split overdue vs in-SLA counts.

**Files:**
- Modify: `server/db-storage.ts`
- Modify: `server/storage/complaints.ts`
- Modify: `client/src/pages/dashboard.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] getUserTasks returns RETURN_PENDING_DISPOSITION tasks for QA/ADMIN
- [ ] getUserTasks returns RETURN_INVESTIGATION_OPEN tasks for QA/ADMIN
- [ ] getComplaintsSummary returns triageOverdue and dispositionOverdue counts
- [ ] Dashboard shows "Returns awaiting disposition" tile (amber if > 0)
- [ ] Dashboard shows "Open return investigations" tile (red if > 0)

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck && pnpm test r06` → no errors; manual dashboard check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["server/db-storage.ts", "server/storage/complaints.ts", "client/src/pages/dashboard.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck && pnpm test r06", "acceptanceCriteria": ["getUserTasks returns RETURN_PENDING_DISPOSITION tasks", "getUserTasks returns RETURN_INVESTIGATION_OPEN tasks", "getComplaintsSummary splits overdue vs in-SLA counts", "Dashboard shows return tiles"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend pages + Quality tab navigation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build the three return pages (list, detail, investigations) and wire them into the Quality tab and App router.

**Files:**
- Create: `client/src/pages/quality/returns.tsx`
- Create: `client/src/pages/quality/ReturnDetail.tsx`
- Create: `client/src/pages/quality/ReturnInvestigations.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/pages/quality/index.tsx`
- Modify: `client/src/App.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns subtab visible in Quality tab
- [ ] List page shows table with ref, source badge, lot, qty, received date, status badge
- [ ] "Log return" button opens intake modal; submits successfully
- [ ] Detail page shows disposition form for QUARANTINE returns with F-04 ceremony
- [ ] Detail page shows read-only disposition summary for DISPOSED returns
- [ ] Investigations page shows expandable OPEN investigations with F-04 close form
- [ ] pnpm typecheck passes

**Verify:** `pnpm typecheck` → no errors; manual browser test of golden path

```json:metadata
{"files": ["client/src/pages/quality/returns.tsx", "client/src/pages/quality/ReturnDetail.tsx", "client/src/pages/quality/ReturnInvestigations.tsx", "client/src/pages/quality/index.tsx", "client/src/App.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns subtab visible in Quality tab", "List page shows correct columns and badges", "Log return modal submits successfully", "Detail page shows disposition form for QUARANTINE", "Detail page shows read-only for DISPOSED", "Investigations page shows expandable OPEN items with close form"]}
```
